allow: PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root --password="" -e "SELECT id, name FROM msv.cities WHERE id=8; SHOW COLUMNS FROM msv.properties;" 2>$null)
PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root --password="" -e "SELECT id, name, process, city, location, main_image, price FROM msv.properties;" 2>$null)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Id -eq 9168 } 2>&1; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 80 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 80 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{Port=80; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Process=$p.Name; State=$_.State} })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 443 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{Port=443; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Process=$p.Name; State=$_.State} })
